name: Weather Plugin
description: Weather data widgets including current conditions, forecasts, air quality, and historical weather using Open-Meteo APIs.

skills.name: weather
skills.description: Weather widget capabilities: current weather, hourly forecast, daily forecast, rain probability, humidity, wind, UV index, and weather code mapping.

skills.name: location
skills.description: Location resolution: city geocoding, current location fallback, and timezone handling for weather queries.

tools.name: forecast
tools.description: Open-Meteo Forecast API: get current, hourly, and daily weather forecasts including temperature, precipitation, wind, UV, and weather codes.

tools.name: air-quality
tools.description: Open-Meteo Air Quality API: get current and hourly AQI (US and European), PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO2, and pollen data.

tools.name: historical
tools.description: Open-Meteo Historical Weather API: get past weather data from 1940 to present using ERA5 reanalysis.

tools.name: geocode
tools.description: Open-Meteo Geocoding API: search for locations by name to get coordinates, timezone, country, and population.

tools.name: current-location
tools.description: Get the user's current location coordinates. Falls back to a configured default location.

assets.name: icons
assets.description: Weather condition icons mapped to WMO weather codes. Includes day/night variants and descriptive labels.
